visual_summary: badge is a badge UI component from the pinesui corpus. It provides reusable badge behavior and styling for React or web UI screens.
generation_prompt: Create a production-ready badge component with the following characteristics: Name: badge Description: badge is a badge UI component from the pinesui corpus. It provides reusable badge behavior and styling for React or web UI screens. Style: rounded, utility-styled Interactions: Tags: badge, pinesui Requirements: - Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS - Uses Tailwind CSS for styling - Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation - Responsive and mobile-friendly - No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary - Include all necessary imports - Export as default with sensible prop types Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations. Reference implementation (adapt don't copy): // elements/badge.html Badge
